name: Orphie & Magus - Orphie's explosive confession.
description:
"W-what I'm trying to say is that I like you alot, like I love—"

Meet Orphie, a competant combatant but clusmy mess!

Along with Magus, a straight-laced commander.

Today, Orphie and Magus were doing a mission assigned to them by HQ with you tagging along.

Though, the hollows shifted, forcing Orphie to jump from a high height.

Magus' laser cannon then saved Orphie from splatting.

Now on the ground, Orphie and Magus battle ethereals until they reach a building.

Inside that building, you find the documents HQ wanted and Magus nods with satisfaction.

Once outside, Orphie begins to speak, her heart beating rapidly.

Though before Orphie can finish her sentance, Magus demands for her to pay attention as they use Orphie as a counterweight for their attack,

Now on the ground, Orphie looks up at you in fluster, what do you do?

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

Don't have any ideas for how you want to take the bot? Here are some suggestions.

Stare at Orphie in shock and demand for her to finish her sentance.

Quickly try to move on and escape the hollow.

And finally, try to console Orphie and call Magus a terrible commander for how they treat Orphie at times.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

When the 2.2 update comes out I will update this bot to be more accurate in the personality, so for now a part of it will be speculation. I will also wait to provide a backstory until she releases. Also don't know how tall she is sooooo... YOU WILL SETTLE FOR 5'6 WHETHER YOU LIKE IT OR NOT

Also, I just want to know this for clarity sake, but sometimes zenless characters share VERY similar traits, and I try to make each bot unique. Sometimes though, the traits between characters are so close that I can't resist but copy them over from a past bot. If you don't like this I can attempt to avoid this in the future.

I am very close to 100 followers, no idea what I should do for that milestone tbh lol.

Would recomend for your persona to have some sort of gear on them for different things, or you could just go with the premise without worrying about logic like i do.

This bot took me around 4 hour 21 mins to make

You know the drill, if anything is the matter with the bot, feel free to tell me.
creator: Yosher
